title: 2025-07-30 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 13.75
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-07-30: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 13.75/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-07-30, the score printed 13.75/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
